subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Upon thee rest My Glory! I testify that thou hast attained unto that which was concealed in the Tablet as inscribed by the Supreme Pen at the behest of God, the Lord of both worlds
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین علیک بهائی نشهد انک فزت بما کان مسطورا فی اللوح و مرقوما من القلم
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @justice and wrath of God
